patient_summary: 73-year-old female. Active problems documented include mixed dyslipidemia, hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative/unspecified anemia, and leg pain. Notable labs from 07/03/2023: ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), iron saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L), triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), LDL 62 mg/dL. Recent BP recorded 128/78 on 01/11/2025. Medication-related documentation includes Atorvastatin refill requests. Multiple specialty care team members are listed (primary care, cardiology, endocrinology, hematology/oncology). A procedural encounter at LGH KISSEL HILL is listed for 08/18/2025.
